title: cnicus capitatus
intro: Cnicus capitatus, also known as Knattikra or Globe Thistle, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the sunflower family native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cnicus capitatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cnicus capitatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
